game_info.title: Leo's Odyssey
game_info.concept: **Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.
game_info.description: Leo's Odyssey is a physics-based platformer where you control Leo, a sentient furball with the ability to change his density. Navigate through hand-crafted levels by rolling, inflating to float like a balloon, and deflating to become heavy and precise. Solve environmental puzzles, avoid deadly spikes, and collect all the gold coins to unlock the exit portal. Master momentum and physics to survive the perilous journey.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left (37) / Arrow Right (39): Roll horizontally
- Space (32) / Arrow Up (38): Inflate (Float / Jump)
- Arrow Down (40): Deflate (Dive / Heavy / Break through weak floors)
- Enter (13): Start Game
- ESC (27): Pause / Resume
- R (82): Restart Level

TEST_1.strategy_description: Simulate holding the Right Arrow key for 60 frames.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player X coordinate should be significantly greater than the starting X coordinate.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify the inflation (float) mechanic reduces gravity/fall speed.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Move the player into the air, then simulate holding Space (Inflate) while falling.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player's vertical velocity should increase (downwards) much slower than standard gravity, simulating floating.
TEST_2.description: Verify the inflation (float) mechanic reduces gravity/fall speed.
TEST_2.strategy: Move the player into the air, then simulate holding Space (Inflate) while falling.

TEST_3.test_description: Attempt to complete Level 1 using a heuristic AI.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will move towards the nearest uncollected coin or the exit, jumping (Inflating) if an obstacle is detected ahead or if the target is above.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game phase should transition to "LEVEL_COMPLETE" or the level index should increment.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify collision with hazards causes death.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Locate a hazard (spike) and move the player directly into it.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".
TEST_4.description: Verify collision with hazards causes death.
